aiconsulting.main.answer: Our AI consulting service focuses on implementation, not theory. We help SMEs define a realistic roadmap, connect AI to existing workflows, and train teams to operate new processes confidently. The result is a phased rollout with clearer decisions, controlled risk, and measurable operational improvements over time.
aiconsulting.what.answer: InnovateXP provides three core AI consulting services for Hong Kong SMEs: AI Readiness Audits (from HKD 8,000), custom AI-augmented workflow builds (from HKD 25,000), and practical AI training / Prompt Engineering workshops (from HKD 12,000). System deployment can support cloud platforms (Azure OpenAI, Alibaba Cloud, GCP, AWS) or self-hosted / on-premise environments where appropriate.

faq.aiconsulting.a1: Prompt engineering training teaches your team how to work with AI systems like ChatGPT, Claude, or custom AI workflow tools. Our hands-on bootcamp covers prompt structure, context optimization, output refinement, and real-world business applications specific to your industry.
faq.aiconsulting.a2: Our AI Readiness Audit (from HKD 8,000) analyzes your current workflows, data infrastructure, team capabilities, and business goals. We identify high-ROI AI opportunities, assess technical requirements, and provide a phased implementation roadmap tailored to your budget and resources.
faq.aiconsulting.a3: We specialize in AI solutions for service-based SMEs including education centers, event organizers, professional services, training providers, and B2B companies in Hong Kong. Our founder has 14 years of tech experience and has managed systems for 2,000+ participants.
faq.aiconsulting.a4: Custom AI workflow projects typically take 4-8 weeks from requirements gathering to deployment. This includes workflow design, integration with your existing systems, testing, and staff training. Pricing starts from HKD 25,000.
faq.aiconsulting.q2: How do you assess AI readiness for SMEs?
faq.aiconsulting.q3: What industries do you provide AI consulting for?
faq.aiconsulting.q4: How long does custom AI workflow development take?
faq.aiconsulting.title: AI Consulting - Frequently Asked Questions
faq.eventxp.a1: EventXP is an event intelligence platform that transforms check-ins into business insights. Beyond attendance tracking, it predicts which attendees are most likely to buy, renew memberships, or require follow-up—turning event data into actionable sales leads.
faq.eventxp.a2: Guests receive a unique QR code via email or WhatsApp. At the event, staff scan the code using EventXP's mobile app. The system instantly logs attendance, matches the guest profile to your CRM, and can trigger automated follow-ups post-event.
faq.eventxp.a3: Yes. EventXP supports unlimited concurrent events with separate dashboards, real-time attendance tracking, and consolidated reporting across all events.
faq.eventxp.q1: What is EventXP event check-in system?
faq.eventxp.q2: How does QR code check-in work for events?
faq.eventxp.q3: Can EventXP handle multiple simultaneous events?
faq.eventxp.q4: What is the cost of EventXP event management system?
faq.eventxp.title: EventXP - Frequently Asked Questions
faq.smartsales.a1: AI CRM is customer relationship management software enhanced with artificial intelligence. Unlike traditional CRM that only stores data, AI CRM automatically drafts follow-up messages, predicts which leads will convert, and prioritizes prospects based on behavior patterns. It saves SMEs 3+ hours daily on repetitive sales tasks.
faq.smartsales.a2: Yes. SmartSales CRM integrates directly with WhatsApp Business API, allowing Hong Kong businesses to receive inquiries, auto-draft responses in Cantonese or English, and track conversation history—all within one dashboard. Human approval is required before sending.
faq.smartsales.a3: SmartSales CRM one-time setup plans are HKD 10,800 (Starter), HKD 18,880 (Growth), and Custom (Enterprise). Monthly maintenance plans are HKD 880, HKD 1,280, and HKD 1,680 respectively. Final cost depends on agreed channel and integration scope.
faq.smartsales.a4: Basic setup takes 1-2 weeks including data migration and team training. Full WhatsApp integration and custom workflows typically require 3-4 weeks. We provide hands-on onboarding support throughout.
faq.smartsales.q1: What is AI CRM and how does it differ from traditional CRM?
faq.smartsales.q2: Can AI CRM integrate with WhatsApp for Hong Kong businesses?
faq.smartsales.q3: How much does AI CRM cost in Hong Kong?
faq.smartsales.q4: How long does it take to implement AI CRM?
faq.smartsales.q5: What ROI can I expect from AI-powered customer management?

roi.intro: SME ROI is usually observed through operational behavior first: less manual coordination, fewer follow-up gaps, and clearer decision visibility. Instead of relying on generic benchmark percentages, track simple before/after process signals that reflect your actual business workflow.
roi.point1.desc: Teams spend less effort on repetitive updates and more on customer conversations, demos, and deal progression.
roi.point1.title: Time Reallocated to Revenue Work
roi.point2.desc: Automation and reminders reduce lost context between staff handoffs and improve consistency.
roi.point2.title: Fewer Process Errors and Missed Follow-ups
roi.point3.desc: Leaders can see which channels, campaigns, or customer segments need attention earlier.
roi.point3.title: Better Visibility for Management Decisions
roi.scenario.1: A small sales team can shift part of admin time into extra calls and demos once updates are automated.
roi.scenario.2: An event-driven business can identify higher-intent attendee segments faster for targeted follow-ups.
roi.scenario.title: Illustrative Scenarios (Not Guaranteed Outcomes)
roi.title: How SMEs Should Measure ROI (Without Guesswork)

timeline.intro: Most SME AI projects run in four phases. Actual duration depends on data quality, integration scope, and decision speed, but this framework helps teams plan resources and expectations without overpromising timelines.
timeline.phase1.desc: Map current workflows, define business goals, and prioritize highest-value use cases.
timeline.phase1.title: Discovery & Blueprint
timeline.phase2.desc: Build workflows, connect CRM/WhatsApp/calendar systems, and set up role-based operations.
timeline.phase2.title: Implementation & Integration
timeline.phase3.desc: Run pilot scenarios, verify data flows, and train staff on daily usage and exception handling.
timeline.phase3.title: Testing & Team Training
timeline.phase4.desc: Tune prompts, improve automation rules, and add incremental capabilities based on usage feedback.
timeline.phase4.title: Optimization
timeline.title: Typical AI Implementation Timeline for SMEs
